highlights.text: I wrote yesterday at 4pm: “My general lean is to defer to the trend and we are closing today right at resistance of a 2 day range which has generally been 5993 to 6038-44 now.
After hitting resistance yesterday, we began working down the range this morning, and I wrote yesterday at 4pm: “ If 6026 fails, we flush back down the range again towards the 5993 magnet.

post_title: Will Thanksgiving Bring A New All Time High For SPX? Nov 28/29 Plan
